shadow-blitz.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-bolt.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

shadow-break.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-chill.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.

shadow-end.effect: User receives 1/2 its HP in recoil.

shadow-fire.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

shadow-rave.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-storm.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-wave.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-down.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.

shadow-half.effect: Halves HP of all Pokémon on the field.  Must recharge

shadow-hold.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

shadow-mist.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by two stages.

shadow-shed.effect: Removes Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.

shadow-sky.effect: Changes the weather to Shadow Sky for five turns.
